overall.description: Gameplay footage from GTA: Vice City showing the protagonist Tommy Vercetti walking through a rainy neon-lit city street at night, then turning toward the beach as the weather clears. The clip transitions from an urban commercial area with Art Deco architecture to an open waterfront promenade.

scene_state.functional_zone: rainy city street with neon-lit art deco buildings

events.description: red sedan drives past on the wet road to the right
large box truck passes by on the right side of the street

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk next to a busy street in heavy rain, passing palm trees

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in yellow shirt jogging away on the sidewalk
red car driving past on the rain-soaked road

entered.detail: tall building with distinctive vertical yellow neon light strips glowing in the rain
row of palm trees lining the sidewalk along the street
tall metal street lamp illuminating the wet sidewalk
rain-soaked multi-lane road reflecting the neon lights

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a rainy city sidewalk at night, with palm trees on the left and an Art Deco building with bright yellow neon lights on the right. Vehicles pass by on the wet road as the character moves forward through the neon-lit urban environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: curved pedestrian path alongside modern hotel building

events.description: character turns left off the main street onto a curved paved path
rain begins to lighten as the character approaches the waterfront area

agents.ego_description: turned left onto a curved path running alongside a large building, heading toward the beach area

notable_agents.action: woman in red dress walking ahead on the curved path

entered.detail: large rectangular building with illuminated windows running along the path
well-maintained grassy area with scattered palm trees
wet tiled walkway curving toward the beachfront

segments.scene_description: The character turns left onto a curved pedestrian path beside a modern hotel building, leaving the main street behind. The path runs between the building and a grassy lawn with palm trees, still under heavy rain as the character approaches the waterfront.

events.description: heavy rain suddenly stops and sky clears to reveal stars and dark purple clouds
approaching the sandy beach and ocean shoreline with people visible in the distance

agents.ego_description: walking along the waterfront promenade as the rain clears, heading toward the beach and ocean

notable_agents.action: people standing and walking on the beach near the water's edge

entered.detail: sandy beach area visible beyond the promenade railing
dark ocean water meeting the night sky on the horizon
low stone retaining wall separating the promenade from the beach
distant buildings with purple and green neon lighting along the shoreline

segments.scene_description: As the rain abruptly stops and the sky clears to reveal stars, the character walks along an open waterfront promenade. The beach and ocean become visible ahead, with distant neon-lit buildings glowing on the right and people scattered along the shoreline in the distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rainy, neon-lit urban street that gradually opens into a clear, starry night at the waterfront. It begins with the character walking along a wet city sidewalk, flanked by palm trees and an Art Deco building glowing with bright yellow neon lights as vehicles pass by on the road. As the character turns left, the scene shifts away from the main street onto a curved pedestrian path that winds between a modern hotel and a grassy lawn under heavy rain. The environment then transforms as the rain abruptly stops and the sky clears to reveal stars, expanding the view across an open waterfront promenade. Finally, the camera moves toward the beach and ocean, with distant neon-lit buildings glowing to the right and figures scattered along the shoreline.
